title: esimd: fix resadd_norm_gemv_int4 race on large N

reportedAffectedPath.symptom: relative error versus IPEX jumps around N > 512 because later workgroups can read an already-updated residual

reportedUnaffectedPath.reason: small N stays on the original fused path

fixSummary: For N > 512, split the fused ResAddNormGEMV INT4 path into a residual/RMS prepass followed by a GEMV-from-normed kernel.

relevance.qwen36DenseInt4: candidate correctness fix before future Qwen3.6 27B dense INT4 speed tests
relevance.minimaxM27AutoroundU4Decode: not expected to affect current MiniMax bridge

decision: Recorded for future Qwen3.6 dense INT4 work; not applied to the dirty MiniMax llm-scaler branch yet.
